_comment: Copy this file to ~/.config/ie-mcp/users.json and fill in your values.
_instructions: 1. For each person you want to give access to, create one entry in the 'users' array.
2. Create a dedicated Anthropic Workspace for each user at https://console.anthropic.com
3. Set a monthly spend limit on each Workspace in the Anthropic Console.
4. Generate an API key for each Workspace and paste it in 'anthropic_api_key'.
5. Generate a random 'gateway_api_key' for each user (e.g., run: openssl rand -hex 16).
6. Give each user ONLY their 'gateway_api_key'. Never share the Anthropic key directly.

users.notes: Workspace spend limit: $25/month — language site contributor
